title: Psychiana, A Mail Order Religion Created in the Small Town of Moscow, Idaho
description: Short video describing Psychiana, a mail order religion that preached the New Thought Movement. In 1928, Dr. Frank B. Robinson created Psychiana in Moscow, Idaho.
creator: Northwest Public Broadcasting
subject: Religion; Frank B. Robinson

title: Good News
description: Radio program corresponding with transcript of Radio Psychiana - Series for Dr. Frank B. Robinson No. 3. Episode begins proclaiming the growth of Pyschiana and then takes listeners to Robinson's home in Moscow, Idaho, describing its appearance. A dialogue begins between a 'guide' and Robinson about miracles, healing, the God-Law, the mail Robinson receives, and the 'Life Impulse' or 'motivating spirit' that allows people to think and live with God.
creator: The Izzard Company
subject: God-Law; Life Spirit; Mircales; Healing; Sudent Letters; Testimonials
publisher-digital: University of Idaho Library Digital Initiatives, https://www.lib.uidaho.edu/digital/

title: Good News - Man's Quest
description: Radio program episode discusses man's quest for answers, then introduces Robinson and his concept of the Cosmic God-Power. Robinson discusses the God-Power, reads a student letter asking for help, and uses the discovery of the 'cosmic ray' by Professor Milikan as evidence that there is invisible power around us. Robinson claims this Power is for our use and can bring anyone what they desire. Also includes a testimonial from a man claimed to live in Holland.
subject: Spirit of God, God-Power;  Cosmic Rays; Science and Technology; Student Letters; Hardship; Material Abundance; Testimonials

title: Good News - Purpose of the Program
description: Radio program episode outlines the purpose of the 'Good News' radio program, to broadcast positive and peaceful things rather than negative. Episode includes organ music and songs sung by Al Marino, jokes made in the face of war, and urges listeners to buy quality-made products for better piece of mind.
